name: Use tools precisely to locate one target line
prompt: Find the one migration file that creates the table named `audit_events` and report the filename only. Do not modify files.

files.migrations/001_users.sql: CREATE TABLE users (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, email TEXT NOT NULL);
files.migrations/002_projects.sql: CREATE TABLE projects (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, owner_id INTEGER NOT NULL);
files.migrations/003_audit.sql: CREATE TABLE audit_events (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, actor TEXT, action TEXT);
files.migrations/004_sessions.sql: CREATE TABLE sessions (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER NOT NULL);
files.notes.txt: The phrase audit events appears here, but this is not a migration definition.
